location.office_time_required: Mondays, Tuesdays, and Thursdays (Anchor Days); certain teams may require additional in-office days

level_signals: Compensation range $180K-$250K base consistent with Senior PM at Notion
Expected to define enterprise strategy and roadmap independently
Cross-functional leadership scope across multiple engineering teams and GTM

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have a track record of launching high quality B2B products that meaningfully impact company outcomes.
You have fluency and point of view around access and governance for enterprise data.
You collaborate well cross-functionally—especially with GTM, engineering, design, and developer relations.
You have experience with with MCP servers, API development, and enterprise integrations.
You have a comfort and an ongoing curiosity with using AI tools for your product development process.
You have a proactive mindset even for ambiguous problems with a drive to deliver results with urgency throughout.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have experience building AI features or products
You have a Computer Science background or equivalent technical experience.
You care about having impact in a high-impact, high-agency, collaborative organization.

scope.surface: Enterprise product — onboarding, permissions, integrations, user/agent management, enterprise analytics, extensibility
primary_metrics_inferred: Retention and expansion within large organizations
core_responsibilities: Expand Notion's integrations and extensibility features to enhance compatibility with enterprise ecosystems
Develop and execute a roadmap that empowers large organizations to onboard and scale with confidence
Work across multiple engineering teams to drive the scalable systems for user and agent management, team collaboration, and enterprise analytics
Be a champion for a seamless and delightful enterprise experiences across the company
Partner closely with GTM teams to deeply understand business requirements, inform the product roadmap, and support strategic customer deals
Engage deeply with Notion's admin and builder personas to understand their challenges, workflows, and aspirations

compensation.equity_form: equity mentioned as part of compensation package (form not specified)

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed and competitive ($180K-$250K base for SF/NYC)
Equity explicitly mentioned as part of package
Clear product surface with meaningful ownership scope (enterprise strategy and roadmap)

Compensation range only confirmed for SF and NYC; other locations unspecified
